title: 🚀 v2.0.0: Agent Cost Tracker — Track LLM API spending per agent/session with budget alerts ...
content:
Track LLM API spending per agent/session with budget alerts and CSV export

🆕 v2.0.0 features:
• Advanced CLI with 8+ subcommands
• JSON output for automation
• Built-in self-tests (CI-ready)
• Zero dependencies (Python stdlib)
• Cross-platform (Windows/macOS/Linux)

Free + MIT. Live on ClawHub: https://clawhub.ai/skills/skills/agent-cost-tracker
GitHub: https://github.com/itsPremkumar/agent-cost-tracker

#ClawHub #OpenClaw #AIAgent #Python #DevTools
